choices.text: 100% tests + Slither/Mythril + external audit (Trail of Bits / OpenZeppelin / Halborn / Code4rena) + multi-sig + Timelock + Pausable + monitoring (Tenderly/Defender) + bug bounty (Immunefi) + incident runbook + Etherscan verified.

questions.explanation: Tests + audit + multi-sig + monitoring + bug bounty.

choices.text: Pause if possible → white-hat self-exploit to extract funds to safe address → fix → return funds + deploy patched contract → public postmortem within 48-72 hours. Transparency preserves trust; silence destroys it.

questions.explanation: Pause → save funds → fix → postmortem publicly.
